notice: MOCKED API RESPONSE SHAPED AFTER REAL SOURCES. Production source: Papers With Code task/dataset records, dataset cards, Hugging Face dataset metadata, publisher supplements, and dataset project pages.

dataset.name: SciQA-LongTail
dataset.license: CC BY-NC 4.0 for public splits; restricted license for benchmark holdout

splits.name: benchmark_holdout
splits.access: application required; annotations released only to approved academic groups

evaluation_policy.metric_documentation: Leaderboard page lists micro-F1 as the default display metric. Macro-F1 is available only in the private evaluator notes.

direct_conflicts.paper_claim: All train, validation, and benchmark holdout splits are public and require no approval.
direct_conflicts.artifact_evidence: benchmark_holdout is restricted and requires application approval.

direct_conflicts.paper_claim: The primary metric is macro-F1 on the benchmark holdout split.
direct_conflicts.artifact_evidence: Dataset catalog lists micro-F1 as the default leaderboard metric.
